app.title: A2 Macro Controller v{version}
controls.hotkey_tooltip: Start / Stop hotkey: {hotkey}. Click to change.
controls.keep_awake_tooltip: Prevent the PC from sleeping or dimming the display while the macro is open.
device.title: Device
device.locate_tooltip: Point the macro at adb yourself. Use this if scanning says 'adb not found': pick HD-Adb.exe inside your BlueStacks folder (or any adb.exe).
device.locate_not_adb_body:
{name} does not look like adb.

Pick HD-Adb.exe (inside your BlueStacks folder) or adb.exe.
game_mode.title: Game mode
game_mode.jungle_hint: Movement is disabled automatically for Shackled Jungle.
game_mode.allstar_root_body:
All-Star Cup mode ONLY works on a rooted BlueStacks instance.

It will not work on a regular phone or an unrooted emulator. (This warning is shown once.)
game_mode.elim_hint: Position the game on the Elim entry screen, then Start. The macro picks your chosen boss at each of the {sets} levels.
game_mode.allstar_hint: Position the game on the level's Challenge screen, then Start. The macro identifies the 3 bosses each set and picks the fastest-dying one, then stops.
game_mode.save_profile_tooltip: Save the active categories, custom priority skills and avoid list shown here as the profile for the currently selected game mode. Reapplied automatically whenever you switch back to that mode.
plant.rounds_tooltip: Stop the macro after this many completed rounds of the level. 0 keeps it running until stopped or the run timeout hits.
plant.spawn_tooltip: Which side YOUR character spawns on. The game decides this by the alphabetical order of the two usernames (not by who hosts), so it stays the same all session with the same partner. If unsure, watch where you spawn in the first round and set it here.
elim.heading: Elim boss picks
elim.instructions: Click a boss to assign it to the highlighted level. Click a level to select it; right-click clears it.
timeout.title: Run timeout
timeout.stop_after_tooltip: Stop the macro automatically after this long. Set to 0 to disable.
timeout.stuck_after_tooltip: Stop the macro if it keeps repeating the same action for this long. Set to 0 to disable.
timeout.close_on_timeout_tooltip: Close the emulator/scrcpy window when the timeout fires.
timeout.sleep_on_timeout_tooltip: Turn the phone screen off via ADB when the timeout fires.
remote.title: Remote
remote.section_sub: Watch and control the macro from your phone
remote.enable_tooltip: Publish the macro's status to your own Cloudflare relay and accept commands (Start/Stop and so on) from the web page. Fully off by default. Needs the companion app A2 Remote.exe next to the main exe, plus a relay and a web page you deploy once (DEPLOY guides in the remote folder of the source repository).
remote.relay_tooltip: The https address of YOUR Cloudflare Worker relay, e.g. https://a2-remote-relay.yourname.workers.dev (see remote/worker/DEPLOY.md).
remote.pages_tooltip: The https address of the status web page you deployed (see remote/pages/DEPLOY.md). Only used to build the pairing link.
remote.copy_link_tooltip: Copies the link that pairs a phone or browser with this install. It contains your secret token: send it only to yourself and only over something private.
remote.link_copied_body:
The pairing link is on the clipboard.

Open it once on the device you want to watch from. Keep it private: anyone with this link can see the status and send the four allowed commands.
remote.need_urls_body: Enter the relay URL and the web page URL first (see the DEPLOY guides in the remote folder of the source repository).
remote.need_https_body: The relay URL must start with https://
remote.regen_tooltip: Create a new secret token. Every pairing link shared so far stops working immediately.
remote.regen_confirm_body:
Create a new secret token?

All existing pairing links stop working immediately, and every device must be paired again with a fresh link.
remote.regen_done_body:
New token created. Old pairing links are now dead.

Use Copy pairing link to pair your devices again.
remote.companion_no_push: Companion: running, waiting for the first successful push...
remote.companion_missing: Companion: A2 Remote.exe not found next to the main exe
wizard.title: ADB Setup Wizard
wizard.heading: ADB Setup Wizard
wizard.intro: Connects an Android device or emulator via ADB, queries its screen resolution, and sets sensible click-target defaults. Run this once when first setting up or when changing devices.
wizard.resolution_summary: Resolution: {w} x {h}  |  CALIBRATED_SCALE: {scale} (current, adjust in Settings if needed)
capture.selection_hint: Drag to select the button area on the screenshot
capture.default_title: Capture (drag to select, then click Confirm)
capture.stop_macro_before_button: stop the macro before adding a custom button
capture.stop_macro_before_ref: stop the macro before recapturing a ref
capture.no_device_selected: no ADB device selected, use the ADB panel to pick one
capture.stream_error: screenrecord stream produced no frame. Check the device screen is on and the USB/ADB connection is stable.
custom_button.add_instructions: Name the button and pick where on screen it appears, then drag a box over it. The macro clicks it whenever it sees it.
custom_button.already_exists_body: A custom button named '{name}' already exists. Replace it?
custom_button.capture_title: Capture custom button '{name}':  drag a box over it, then Confirm
ref.recapture_instructions:
Pick an existing reference to recapture, OR type a new name to capture a brand-new ref. Choose where on screen it appears, then drag a box tightly around it (saved at the standard match scale, so any device works).

A new ref is only saved for later, the macro uses it only once you wire it up in code.
ref.name_required_body: Enter or pick a reference name.
ref.capture_title: {verb} '{name}':  drag a box over it, then Confirm
ref_wizard.title: Recapture refs for another language
ref_wizard.intro: Switch the game to French or German, then walk through each text-bearing button here. For each one you take an ADB screenshot and drag a box over the button; the crop is saved to ref/<lang>/. Buttons you skip keep using the English template.
ref_wizard.step_instruction: Show this button in the game in {lang}, then Capture and drag a tight box over it. Skip it to keep the English version.
ref_wizard.status_captured: A {lang} variant is saved for this ref.
ref_wizard.capture_title: Capture '{name}' in {lang}:  drag a box over it, then Confirm
ref_wizard.summary_fallback: Missing variants automatically fall back to the English template, so a partial set still works.
picker.click_to_prioritise: Click a tile to prioritise it
picker.click_to_avoid: Click a tile to avoid it
picker.no_skills_found: No skill images found. Add PNG icons to the skills/ category subfolders, then reopen this window.
settings.title: Settings
settings.setup_wizard_tooltip: Connect a device, detect resolution, set defaults.
settings.test_connection_tooltip: Take an ADB screenshot to confirm the connection.
settings.advanced_warning: Advanced - only touch these if you know what you're doing.
settings.invalid_setting_body: Could not read a number for '{field}'. Please check it.
settings.invalid_movement_body: Could not read a number for a Movement field.
settings.group.timing_sub: How often the macro looks and acts
settings.group.humanisation_sub: Add randomness so taps look human
settings.group.capture_sub: How frames are pulled from the device
settings.language_restart_hint: Restart the app to apply the new language everywhere.
settings.hint.poll_interval: How long the macro waits between screen checks.
settings.hint.action_delay: Pause after a tap so the screen can settle before the next check.
settings.hint.startup_delay: Grace period after pressing Start before the first screen check. With ADB the game window no longer needs to be focused.
settings.hint.skill_settle_delay: After a skill-selection screen is detected, wait this long and re-grab before reading the cards, so a fast poll doesn't scan before the cards and Refresh button finish animating in. 0.1-0.2s is plenty; 0 disables.
settings.hint.run_timeout: Stop the macro automatically after this long. Set to 0 to disable the timeout and run until stopped manually.
settings.hint.stuck_timeout: Stop the macro if it keeps repeating the same action (e.g. tapping a button that won't dismiss) for this long. Set to 0 to disable.
settings.hint.close_on_timeout: When the timeout fires, also close the game window, the BlueStacks emulator (and its background services) or the scrcpy mirror window.
settings.hint.sleep_on_timeout: When the timeout fires, turn the phone screen off via ADB so the game pauses and the phone stops overheating.
settings.hint.skill_threshold: Minimum confidence to accept a skill-icon match. Higher is stricter, fewer false matches, but more misses.
settings.hint.ui_threshold: Minimum confidence to accept a UI-element match (Play button, devil offer, game-over screen, refresh button).
settings.hint.skill_downscale: Skill matching runs at this fraction of full resolution for speed. 1.0 = full res; 0.5 is roughly 4x faster.
settings.hint.ref_downscale: UI refs/banners are matched over the whole frame, so they dominate the poll time. This runs them at a fraction of resolution. 0.6 is ~2.5x faster; 0.5 faster still but riskier for short refs (game-over, level).
settings.hint.calibrated_scale: Zoom factor applied to all template scales. 1.0 means the bundled templates already match the phone's native resolution. Run Setup Wizard to determine the correct value for your device.
settings.hint.stream_capture: Capture from a continuous Android screenrecord H.264 stream instead of a screencap each poll. Keeps the display composited, which fixes BlueStacks all-black frames during gameplay, and is faster. Needs PyAV; automatically falls back to screencap if it is unavailable.
settings.hint.click_jitter: Each tap is nudged by up to this many random pixels so input is not pixel-perfect.
settings.hint.delay_jitter: Poll and action delays vary randomly by +/- this fraction (0.35 means +/-35%).
settings.hint.language: Language used by the GUI and the updater. The macro engine's own log messages stay in English.
fast_input.root_hint: Route every tap through the low-latency sendevent path instead of 'adb input tap'. Faster on all game modes. Requires rooted BlueStacks (or any device with a writable /dev/input node); falls back to normal taps automatically if that is unavailable.
fast_input.root_required_warning: Requires rooted BlueStacks, or any device with a writable /dev/input node. On an ordinary phone or emulator it safely falls back to normal taps.
fast_input.humanized_hint: Add human-like variance to each fast tap: a few pixels of position jitter, a randomised 60-120ms hold, tiny mid-tap drift, and small timing variance. Applies to every mode, All-Star included.
fast_input.humanized_speed_warning: Humanized taps slow All-Star Cup down (each tap holds 60-120ms with drift). Turn this off to restore All-Star's raw tapping speed.
fast_input.humanized_needs_root: Turn on Root fast input first. Humanization only applies to the fast (sendevent) tap path.
movement.explanation: Joystick starts bottom-centre; each vector swipes ~10% of screen height at the angle, held for the duration. Set duration 0 to skip.
movement.time_scale_tooltip: Seconds per unit. All Plant Defense durations are T-multiples, so adjusting T scales everything.
movement.test_spawn_tooltip: Spawn to simulate for Conduct Movement. In a real run the side comes from the Spawn Side toggle in the Plant Defense panel.
movement.conduct_tooltip: Run movement for the selected test spawn immediately.
hotkey.heading: Set Start / Stop Hotkey
hotkey.instructions: Click here first, then press a new key combination:
start.nothing_to_pick_body:
No skill categories are active and no custom priority skills are set, so the macro will always take a skill slot.

Start anyway?
log.title: Log
log.profile_saved: saved skill profile for game mode: {name}
log.profile_loaded: loaded skill profile for game mode: {name}
log.autosave_on: autosave on, settings save after every change
log.keep_awake_on: keep awake on, PC will not sleep or dim
log.gui_locked: GUI locked, window pinned on top
splash.title: A2 Macro Controller
updater.press_check_hint: Press "Check for Updates" to look for a new version on GitHub.
updater.checking: Checking GitHub for the latest release...
updater.check_failed_network: Could not reach GitHub. Check your internet connection and try again. ({error})
updater.update_failed_rolled_back: Update failed: {error}. Nothing was changed that wasn't rolled back; try again later.
updater.update_complete_notes:
Update complete! Your settings, custom buttons, and match zones were preserved.

You can close this window and launch the app as usual.
updater.updated_to: Updated to {tag}. You're good to go!
